executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: (1) created specs/037-llm-agent-tools/scenario-manifest.json with 33 SCN-037-* entries; (2) reconciled Scope 1 + Scope 5 Test Plan rows in specs/037-llm-agent-tools/scopes.md to reference existing test files (internal/agent/config_test.go, internal/nats/contract_test.go, internal/agent/sst_guard_test.go, tests/integration/agent/loop_test.go) and tagged each Behavior cell with its SCN-037-NNN id; (3) renamed the Scope 3 Test Plan column header to '| Layer | Behavior | Location | Type |' and moved the SCN-037-006 prefix to the row's leading position to break the fuzzy collision against the header; (4) appended a single new 'Appendix: Traceability Evidence Index (BUG-037-002)' to specs/037-llm-agent-tools/report.md listing the 12 literal repo-relative test-file path tokens that the guard's report_mentions_path check (grep -Fq) was missing. No production code, no other parent artifacts (spec.md, design.md, state.json), and no sibling specs modified.

Artifact-only fix: regression test is the traceability-guard run itself (see validate phase). Underlying behavior tests (internal/agent/*_test.go, tests/integration/agent/*, tests/e2e/agent/*, tests/stress/agent/*, internal/nats/contract_test.go, ml/tests/test_nats_contract.py) are unchanged and remain part of spec 037's existing passing test suite.

Bug folder artifacts (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) populated with full content. Parent report.md gained a single Traceability Evidence Index appendix tightly scoped to BUG-037-002. No external doc syncing required (artifact-only fix; no API surface, runtime behavior, or operator workflow changed).

Traceability-guard PASS: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/037-llm-agent-tools returns RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings) with 33/33 scenario-to-row mappings, 33/33 concrete test file references, 33/33 report evidence references, and 33/33 G068 DoD fidelity. Pre-fix baseline was RESULT: FAILED (16 failures, 0 warnings) covering all four categories (manifest missing, broken paths, header fuzzy collision, missing report evidence path tokens). Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence.

Artifact lint PASS for both parent (bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/037-llm-agent-tools) and bug folder (bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/037-llm-agent-tools/bugs/BUG-037-002-dod-scenario-fidelity-gap). git status --short specs/037-llm-agent-tools/ confirms boundary: zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, tests/, web/, or any sibling specs/<NNN>/ folder. All edits confined to specs/037-llm-agent-tools/scopes.md, specs/037-llm-agent-tools/scenario-manifest.json, specs/037-llm-agent-tools/report.md (appendix only), and the new bug folder. git diff specs/037-llm-agent-tools/state.json returns empty — spec 037 implementation status, ceiling, and certification untouched.

Chaos N/A for artifact-only documentation/traceability fix: no runtime code path, no concurrency, no failure injection surface affected. Recorded for ceiling compliance per workflow specReview enforcement.
